query_normalized: predicting plant stress response from publicly available transcriptomic data biology
rationale: This paper satisfies criterion (a) as it measures the same biological mechanism (plant stress response) and utilizes the same data type (RNA-Seq transcriptomic data) to investigate stress tolerance, even though it focuses on a specific mutant and includes electrophysiology. It also meets criterion (b) by providing empirical data on the dependent variable (stress response/tolerance) and the independent variable (transcriptomic changes) within the user's specified domain of plant biology.
